source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Full Stack
source_jobs.description:
As a Senior Software Engineer, Full-Stack at Nuon, you will be responsible for providing a high-quality user experience to our customers. You should have extensive full-stack experience with stateful UIs, cross-platform UX flows, API design, and databases of different kinds.

Nuon HQ is located in San Francisco, CA. This is a remote position, but you must be willing to travel to the office at least once a quarter.




JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Collaborate with product/engineering teams to align API design with business logic and customer needs.

 - Design, develop, and maintain RESTful APIs for both customer-facing and internal tools, prioritizing scalability and security best practices.

 - Maintain comprehensive OpenAPI/Swagger documentation.

 - Design, develop, and maintain database schemas for Postgres, Clickhouse, and other databases.

 - Extend our actor-based Temporal workflow orchestration system: https://nuon.co/blog/how-we-rebuilt-our-api-using-long-lived-workflows/

 - Monitor performance metrics to ensure we meet SLAs.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 8+ years of experience as at a Software-as-a-Service company, ideally one in the developer tools space, with experience with the challenges of deploying software either in an internal capacity or as part of the overall product offering.

 - Experience architecting, building and maintaining Golang applications. Knowledge of Gin and Gorm preferred.

 - Design, develop, and maintain database schemas for Postgres, Clickhouse, and other databases.

 - Experience working with asynchronous job orchestration, preferably using Temporal.io http://Temporal.io.




ABOUT NUON

Nuon is building the industry-leading Bring Your Own Cloud (BYOC) platform, to empower SaaS providers to deploy their applications into their customer’s cloud. It has raised 16.5M to date in series A and seed rounds. Learn more about our investors here https://nuon.co/about.

source_jobs.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
source_jobs.description:
As a Senior Software Engineer, Cloud at Nuon, you will be responsible for building and maintaining features to manage cloud infrastructure across multiple platforms. You should have extensive backend development experience, especially with API design, asynchronous programming, complex workflow execution, and databases of different kinds. Due to the nature of our product, you will also need experience with cloud infrastructure and complex service orchestration.

Nuon HQ is located in San Francisco, CA. This is a remote position, but you must be willing to travel to the office at least once a quarter.




JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Extend our actor-based Temporal workflow orchestration system: https://nuon.co/blog/how-we-rebuilt-our-api-using-long-lived-workflows/

 - Support deployment to cloud platforms like AWS and Azure.

 - Support complex service orchestration using kubernetes.

 - Monitor performance metrics to ensure we meet SLAs.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 8+ years of experience as at a Software-as-a-Service company, ideally one in the developer tools space, with experience with the challenges of deploying software either in an internal capacity or as part of the overall product offering.

 - Experience architecting, building, and maintaining Golang applications. Knowledge of Gin and Gorm preferred.

 - Design, develop, and maintain database schemas for Postgres, Clickhouse, and other databases.

 - Experience working with asynchronous job orchestration, preferably using Temporal.io http://Temporal.io.

 - Experience deploying and maintaining complex architectures on AWS. Other cloud platforms like Azure preferred.

 - Experience using Terraform. Other IaC (Infra as Code,) tools like Pulumi preferred.

 - Experience with complex Kubernetes architectures and Helm. Kyverno knowledge preferred.




ABOUT NUON

Nuon is building the industry-leading Bring Your Own Cloud (BYOC) platform, to empower SaaS providers to deploy their applications into their customer’s cloud. It has raised 16.5M to date in series A and seed rounds. Learn more about our investors here https://nuon.co/about.

source_jobs.title: Sales Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Nuon is hiring a Sales Engineer to support our revenue growth.

You will work with the Founder and VP of Revenue leadership to communicate the Nuon value proposition and technical capabilities to help close new customers.

This position is in SF and is in office in South Park. (1 mile walk from nearest BART and 1.5 mile walk from main Ferry Building)




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Manage Nuon’s demo assets including weekly setup of multiple apps in Nuon Cloud to demonstrate various use cases for prospects

 - Demo Nuon to prospects

 - Stay current with all new features which means maintaining a local development environment like the engineering team

 - Test the Nuon product and report bugs

 - Communicate and technically support prospects and customers in public and shared Slack channels

 - Contribute to Nuon’s documentation and knowledge base

 - Assist/lead proof-of-concepts

 - Attend conferences and meet-ups

 - Author technical blog posts

 - Host technical webinars
   
   


WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Have worked for early stage startups which means you work hard and don’t act like a 9-5 job

 - 3+ years as a customer-facing engineer in infrastructure and/or developer tools space

 - Strong customer-facing skills to present and demo the Nuon value proposition and earn trust with technical stakeholders

 - Solid Linux skills

 - Proficient with AI tools like Claude Code

 - 2+ years with Kubernetes and containerization

 - Proficient with AWS and additional clouds like Google Cloud or Azure

 - 2+ years with Terraform

 - Expertise with networking: VPCs, load balancers, ingress controllers




EXTRA CREDIT

 - Performed developer relations duties

 - Authored many technical blog posts

 - Are active and prolific on X and Hacker News about technical content

 - Have been a full-stack engineer before getting into sales




ABOUT NUON

Nuon is an infrastructure platform that enables software vendors to deploy and manage their applications directly into customer cloud environments — a model known as Bring Your Own Cloud (BYOC). Nuon gives vendors a secure, auditable architecture to manage a fleet of BYOC and single-tenant deployments, along with the day-2 operations their customers expect. This gives enterprise buyers the security, compliance, and data residency they require — without vendors having to build and maintain that infrastructure themselves.

source_jobs.title: Content Distributor & Developer Relations
source_jobs.description:
Nuon is hiring a part or full-time person to manage our socials, drive content distribution and interact with the developer community.

Distribution of our content is a top priority at Nuon. The Founder, VP of Revenue and the engineers author technical and strategic blog posts and ship micro sites like Awesome BYOC https://awesomebyoc.com/ and Bring Your Helm https://bringyourhelm.com/ — this person must understand the content and know who, how, where, and when to post it.

This position is in SF and is in office in South Park. (1 mile walk from nearest BART and 1.5 mile walk from main Ferry Building)




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Published scheduled social posts on X, LinkedIn, YouTube, and Hacker News with Nuon-generated content

 - Follow and engage with Nuon opinions on other software vendor corporate and founder X and LinkedIn threads

 - Stay current with all new product features which means maintaining a local development environment like the engineering team

 - Test the Nuon product and report bugs

 - Communicate with prospects in our public Slack workspace

 - Contribute to Nuon’s documentation and knowledge base

 - Attend conferences and meet-ups

 - Author technical blog posts

 - Host developer relations webinars and podcasts




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Have worked for early stage startups which means you work hard and don’t act like a 9-5 job

 - 3+ years as social media and/or developer relations professional in the infrastructure and/or developer tools space

 - Authored many technical blog posts

 - Are active and prolific on X and Hacker News about technical content

 - Strong developer-facing skills to explain Noun’s technology and value proposition in written and spoken form

 - Proficient with AI tools like Claude

 - Familiarity with Terraform, Kubernetes and containerization

 - Familiarity with AWS and additional clouds like Google Cloud or Azure

 - Understanding networking: VPCs, load balancers, ingress controllers




EXTRA CREDIT

 - Have hands-on, more technical real-world experience with the technologies described above

 - Authored many technical blog posts

 - Have been a full-stack engineer before getting into this GTM role




ABOUT NUON

Nuon is an infrastructure platform that enables software vendors to deploy and manage their applications directly into customer cloud environments — a model known as Bring Your Own Cloud (BYOC). Nuon gives vendors a secure, auditable architecture to manage a fleet of BYOC and single-tenant deployments, along with the day-2 operations their customers expect. This gives enterprise buyers the security, compliance, and data residency they require — without vendors having to build and maintain that infrastructure themselves.

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Nuon is hiring a Forward Deployed Engineer to own the operational success of our largest BYOC customers.

You will work with the Founder, VP of Revenue, and Engineering to deploy, operate, and continuously improve dedicated Nuon control plane instances running in our enterprise customers' clouds — a deployment model we call Nuon BYOC (versus Nuon Cloud, our multi-tenant SaaS).

This person is the technical owner of those installs: configuring and maintaining the Nuon BYOC app config, running migrations and upgrades, monitoring health through Datadog and our admin dashboard, executing break-glass operations when needed, and refining the runbooks our team uses to do all of the above repeatably. Think of this role as a Sales Engineer's technical depth paired with an SRE's operational instinct, pointed at a small number of high-value customers.

This position is in SF and is in office in South Park. (1 mile walk from nearest BART and 1.5 mile walk from main Ferry Building)




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own Nuon installation and day-2 operations for our enterprise BYOC customers — runner upgrades, control plane migrations, version rollouts, incident response

 - Author and refine the runbooks, policies, and versioned actions that govern how the team operates customer BYOC environments

 - Maintain the Nuon BYOC app config itself — the configuration that defines how a Nuon control plane gets deployed into a customer cloud — and treat it like product code

 - Build and maintain Nuon app configs for customer applications during onboarding and POCs

 - Monitor customer environments via Datadog, our admin dashboard, and platform telemetry (runner health, workflow execution, Temporal status); respond to alerts before customers notice

 - Execute customer-initiated break-glass operations with the auditability and time-bound access controls our customers expect

 - Operate the underlying infrastructure stack — ClickHouse, PostgreSQL, Temporal, control API, dashboard, runner API — well enough to triage when something misbehaves

 - Coordinate change windows, migrations, and rollback plans directly with customer engineering teams

 - Partner with the IST-based on-call team on follow-the-sun handoffs

 - Feed real operational pain back into the product — file bugs, write design docs, push for the right primitives instead of more runbook duct tape

 - Communicate and technically support customers in shared Slack channels

 - Contribute to Nuon's documentation and knowledge base
   
   


WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Have worked for early stage startups which means you work hard and don't act like a 9-5 job

 - 4+ years as a customer-facing engineer, SRE, forward deployed engineer, or implementation engineer in infrastructure and/or developer tools space

 - Comfortable being the technical face of Nuon to an enterprise customer's engineering team — earning trust, running an incident bridge, and explaining trade-offs

 - Strong Linux skills

 - Proficient with AI tools like Claude Code

 - 3+ years operating Kubernetes in production (not just demos) — debugging pods, RBAC, ingress, cluster upgrades

 - Proficient with AWS and at least one of Google Cloud or Azure; comfortable with all three

 - 2+ years with Terraform

 - Expertise with networking: VPCs, load balancers, ingress controllers, private connectivity

 - Hands-on experience with at least one of: PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, or Temporal in production

 - Bias toward writing the runbook, not just running it




EXTRA CREDIT

 - Have run BYOC, single-tenant, or on-prem deployments for an enterprise SaaS company before

 - Have been a full-stack or platform engineer before moving into a customer-facing role

 - Have operated Temporal workflows in production

 - Have done SOC 2 or similar compliance work alongside customer ops

 - Are active and prolific on X and Hacker News about technical content




ABOUT NUON

Nuon is an infrastructure platform that enables software vendors to deploy and manage t

notes: Highly technical job postings with a focus on cloud infrastructure and software engineering. Some non-technical roles, but engineering dominates.
